# Mohammad Aziz

> Personal blog and projects by Mohammad Aziz

## Blog Posts

- [The $50/Million Token Problem With Fable 5](https://iaziz786.com/blog/fifty-dollar-token-problem/index.md): Anthropic launched their most powerful model yet. Mostly I don&#39;t need it.

- [Realisation of Unfixable](https://iaziz786.com/blog/realisation-of-unfixable/index.md): I talked about realising how rare things in life are unfixable so I can take actions.

- [Your Next Idea Isn't in Your Head, It's in Your Browser Tabs](https://iaziz786.com/blog/your-next-idea-isnt-in-your-head-its-in-your-browser-tabs/index.md): A nice way to get unstuck about finding good ideas

- [Why Urgency Is Your Friend](https://iaziz786.com/blog/why-urgency-is-your-friend/index.md): I finally understood why urgency is important.

- [Keep Working On Wrong Ideas](https://iaziz786.com/blog/keep-working-on-wrong-ideas/index.md): Here is my take on completing your personal projects.

- [Boring Work Needs Tension](https://iaziz786.com/blog/boring-work-needs-tension/index.md): We can make our work exciting by chasing the every day tension.

- [OOP is not Design Patterns](https://iaziz786.com/blog/oop-is-not-design-patterns/index.md): It&#39;s tough to build a design pattern thinking that fits rightly at the problem that you are solving.

- [Self-hosted: WireGuard VPN Server on Ubuntu, with MacOS and Android Clients](https://iaziz786.com/blog/self-hosted-vpn-wireguard/index.md): You don&#39;t need to buy a VPN provider to get high performance VPN server.

- [Work Like a CPU](https://iaziz786.com/blog/work-like-a-cpu/index.md): More focused, more efficient

- [Unleash Your Potential As a Brand](https://iaziz786.com/blog/branding-yourself/index.md): Developing Your Ethical Framework.

- [Breaking Free: How I Self-Hosted My SMTP Server with Haraka](https://iaziz786.com/blog/self-hosted-smtp-haraka/index.md): Send thousands of emails per second at the cost of pennies.

- [Small Simple Solutions Scale](https://iaziz786.com/blog/small-simple-solutions-scale/index.md): You don&#39;t need to complicate to scale to billions of people.

- [How to Get a Free PostgreSQL* Database?](https://iaziz786.com/blog/free-cockroachdb-server/index.md): Relation databases are fit for more general workload than NoSQL database. Know how you can get your own  PostgreSQL* …

- [One Step At a Time on Your Personal Projects](https://iaziz786.com/blog/sustainable-person-project-approach/index.md): Build tools for you

- [How to Publish Your First Rust Crate?](https://iaziz786.com/blog/publish-first-rust-crate/index.md): With crates, you share your work with other developers, learn how to publish your first crate.

- [How to Import Local Package in Golang?](https://iaziz786.com/blog/import-local-package-in-go/index.md): When you are developing a module, learn how you can import and test them in other go projects before publishing it.

- [How to Work with Arbitrary JSON in Go?](https://iaziz786.com/blog/golang-arbitrary-json/index.md): Many times you come across JSON which has very arbitrary in structure, Learn how you can handle them to get to in Go

- [How to Use Embedding to Write Cleaner Code in Go?](https://iaziz786.com/blog/clean-code-with-embedding-in-go/index.md): Know how borrowing a type can give you clean code

- [How to Handle Missing Fields From A Struct in Go?](https://iaziz786.com/blog/handle-missing-struct-fields/index.md): If you want to remove the struct field which is not present while unmarshalling JSON

- [How to Auto Reload Golang Applications?](https://iaziz786.com/blog/golang-auto-reload-apps/index.md): Learn how to reload golang applications without too much manual work

- [Merge Sort In Go](https://iaziz786.com/blog/merge-sort-in-go/index.md): Using divide and conquer to build merge sort in Go

- [Hello Internet](https://iaziz786.com/blog/hello-internet/index.md): This is my first blog post about launching my first site
